title: insight trajectory
summary: The development thread focuses on the inspection and refinement of eight stated-plan documents, with a particular emphasis on PR #5's gap-analysis and UX catalogue. Key decisions include the declaration of a tier-3 register, the identification of top suspects for resolution or deferral, and the implementation of boundary rules for insight-emergent-properties. Outcomes involve the structured evaluation of documents, the prioritization of issues, and the adaptation of features based on user experience requirements.
